rulings.Case Title: DE ANZA FLP VS. STERLING BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Of Dismissal Of First Amended Complaint Per Ccp 581(F)
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT STERLING SAVINGS BANK's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Of Dismissal Of First Amended Complaint Per Ccp 581(F). Grant dismissal. Plaintiff failed to file amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FELITA SAMPLE VS. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Immediate Injunction To Prevent Trespass
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF FELITA SAMPLE's Motion For Immediate Injunction To Prevent Trespass. Deny, moving party failed to comply with September 17, 2012 order to provide court with courtesy copies; opposing party has given proper notice and has properly entered the premises. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. LISA WYNN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Petition For Relief From Forfeiture Of Tenancy
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT LISA WYNN's Notice And Petition For Relief From Forfeiture Of Tenancy. Hearing required to explain how will remit amount owed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. GIGI ELLIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Petition For Relief From Forfeiture
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs GIGI ELLIS and WILLIAM BAILES Notice Of Application And Petition For Relief From Forfeiture. Hearing required to address service of process re this notice allegedly served sep-20-2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. RUTH CHRISTO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT RUTH CHRISTO's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment. Hearing requied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NAY PATEL VS. PHILIP MAYERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT PHILIP MYERS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition. Answer to be filed forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHAO XIONG LI VS. CHOI LAN LEUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 25, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANTs CHOI LEUNG and KA LO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege in good faith compliance with San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9(c). = (501/REQ)
